title: Grastidium verruciflorum
taxonomy: Grastidium verruciflorum is a species of flowering plant in the family Restionaceae. It belongs to the genus Grastidium and is a member of the subclass Commelinidae. This classification places Grastidium verruciflorum within the larger group of monocotyledonous plants. The family Restionaceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as restios, which are native to Australia and South Africa. As a member of this family, Grastidium verruciflorum shares characteristics with other restios.
